# Transcrição: 1. Texting During Engagement

## [00:00 - 01:18]

Number one texting is my favorite one during engagement. During the engagement, literally they're with me, they're on the phone with me, or they're on my website. I wanna see if I can push a text to their cell phone. This will increase your transaction conversions by 40 times, okay, 40 times. By simply using the phone you have to push data to the phone they have. When you do this, I want you to use information overload. You know what that means? If not, go back to sell the fundamentals of selling. Information overload is when I give people more information than they ask for. Number two, choices and inventory. If he's looking at Big Boy Watch, I want you to take him down a model and I want you to show him something even more expensive, even if he's crying about the price already. Number three, other information, other information in the space. Data, information, product information about the product. Maybe even another brand here, going back to choice of inventory. Also, use data that you want to be discarded. Do you understand that? When you text, I want you to send data to see if they will discard that content. Why? Because when they say no, I wouldn't want that. I would never look at green or whatever the case is, then you got clear about what they do want. Try this.
